videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Why Magic is How it Is in 2025 and Why Everything Changed
videos.description:
I went down the rabbit hole of Hasbro's finances and it explains everything...

Hasbro's Q2 2025 earnings report: https://investor.hasbro.com/news-releases/news-release-details/hasbro-reports-second-quarter-2025-financial-results

Quarter 1 2025: https://investor.hasbro.com/news-releases/news-release-details/hasbro-reports-first-quarter-2025-financial-results

Hasbro 2024 Annual Report: https://investor.hasbro.com/static-files/7b72a59f-d682-46df-b16a-4f2a7de92143

Hasbro's annual report archive (all annual reports from 2012 - 2023) https://investor.hasbro.com/financial-information/annual-reports

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

#MTG #magicthegathering #opinion

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: A Living End Deck is in Standard
videos.description:
This is our take on the Living End-esque deck in Standard! Terror of the Peaks per the usual should help us close out the game faster

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-a-living-end-deck-is-in-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7360171#paper

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Mono-White Devotion, but Anti-Venom Makes it Good | Much Abrew
videos.description:
Anti-Venom, Horrifying Healer has a ridiculous amount of white mana symbols. Can it make Mono-White Devotion a thing? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-anti-venom-mono-white-devotion-historic
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7357870#paper
